prompt: Create a workflow that triggers whenever a new email arrives in our shared support inbox. For each new email, post a message to the Slack channel #support-triage that includes the sender's email address, the subject line, and the full text content of the email so the on-call engineer can read it without leaving Slack. Configure all nodes as completely as possible and don't ask me for credentials, I'll set them up later.

scenarios.name: body-reaches-slack
scenarios.description: A new support email arrives and its body content shows up in the Slack message
scenarios.dataSetup: The Gmail Trigger fires for one new email from customer@acme.com with subject 'Cannot connect API key' and a body explaining that the API returns 401 even after rotating the key three times.
scenarios.successCriteria: The Slack message posted to #support-triage contains the sender address customer@acme.com, the subject 'Cannot connect API key', and the full text body explaining the 401 issue. The body content is the actual email body, not just the subject or a generic snippet.
